name: repo-pulse
description: Summarize git activity in the current repository since you were last active.

extra_emails.title: Additional email addresses
extra_emails.description: Optional. Your git config user.email is used automatically for the current repo. Add any OTHER addresses you've committed with here (old work email, personal gmail, etc.) so 'My activity' and 'Merged by others' classify them correctly.

default_since.title: Fallback time window
default_since.description: Used only when the smart default can't find your last commit in this repo. Any value git log --since accepts (e.g., '7 days ago', '2 weeks ago', '2026-04-01').
